evidence: LLDB could not launch because debugserver is unavailable on this host, and GDB could not consume the generated DWARF, so fallback state capture was used. The instrumented debug binary showed mark.value.UpToUnread() bytes = 16777364, mark covers entire input = true, replay lexer SkipToToken = OK, JsonStringToMessage status = OK, Parsed embedded value bytes = 15286215, and resident memory delta = 49414144 bytes. This proves ParseAny buffered and reparsed the entire 16 MiB Any object without a size guard.
